[cron:04122194-3e8b-4a72-97ac-94eb21645fa0 ghl-funnel-qualification-60m] L2.5 FUNNEL + QUALIFICATION LOOP: Check recent opt-ins/inbound messages in GHL. Ensure each lead has pipeline stage, owner/task, lead_score placeholder, and next action. For leads waiting >10 minutes, create urgent follow-up tasks. LIMITED OUTBOUND ENABLED: send first-response SMS/email only for opted-in leads with explicit inbound message or form request, max 1 initial response/contact per 24h and max 25 total sends/run. Use compliant, value-first scripts; no claims inflation. Never message do-not-contact/unsubscribed/complaint-tagged leads. For objection handling, send one targeted clarification plus CTA, then route to human task if unresolved. Return urgent summary only for SLA breaches, high-intent opportunities, or guardrail issues; otherwise blank.

$base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com'

# Pull recent conversations/messages (last 2h)
$convUrl="$base/conversations/?locationId=$loc&limit=100"
$convs=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri $convUrl -Headers $h
$convs | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6
